text: "Hello?" "Yes." "Hi, this is Adriana with U.S. medical supply. Hope I caught you at a good time. I'm calling about the continuous glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood sugar without pricking your finger. Do you have diabetes?" "No, I'm sorry." "That's good. Take care now."
